rationale: Source is a forward-looking brainstorm proposing a NEW IntentRouterMixin + IntentRouter engine, not a bug report. It self-declares an unverified 'Codebase Contract' (ask/configure/RenderPhase/RequestContext/encoder). The plan verifies each anchor and locates where output_mode should live.

queries.intent: Confirm BasicAgent.ask() exists and capture its real signature + where a hook could be inserted (REQUEST phase).
Confirm BasicAgent.configure() exists as the CONFIGURE-phase setup point for one-time encoder/route loading.
Confirm whether a RenderPhase (CONFIGURE vs REQUEST) enum actually exists — the brainstorm's two-phase principle depends on it.
Resolve the BLOCKING question: does a named RequestContext carrier exist, or is per-ask state kwargs/dict/attrs on self? Determines hook signature and where output_mode lives.
Find the existing encoder/embeddings abstraction (SentenceTransformer or HF wrapper) to reuse so the mixin adds no new runtime dependency (Axis B1).
Confirm the mixins directory location — brainstorm assumed parrot/agents/mixins/ but mixins appear to live at parrot/bots/mixins/.
Read BasicAgent (bots/basic.py) to ground the ask()/configure() signatures, MRO, and an insertion point for _resolve_output_mode.
Check whether an output_mode / intent_score field or any output-mode concept already exists anywhere (avoid duplicating a contract).
Check for a prior intent-router design/implementation (there is an intent-router.brainstorm.md sibling) and any semantic-router usage already present.
Inspect an existing mixin in bots/mixins to learn the established mixin pattern (super() chaining, configure() override conventions).
Recent activity on bots/basic.py — is ask()/configure() under active churn that would conflict with adding a hook?
Read the embeddings base/registry to decide whether to reuse the abstraction or instantiate SentenceTransformer directly in the engine.

expected_findings: BasicAgent.ask() real signature and the place a pre-LLM hook fits
Whether configure() is the right CONFIGURE-phase hook
Whether RenderPhase exists or is aspirational
Definitive answer on the RequestContext carrier (the blocking question)
An existing encoder abstraction to reuse
Whether output_mode already exists as a field/contract
Whether a prior intent-router design already landed
